prompt:
Brand asset for "灵木洞天 / LYDT" personal portfolio. Create a circular tree-ring emblem logo, viewed straight-on, centered on solid deep ink-green background #0B211D.

Concept: Multiple concentric tree-ring circles, slightly irregular like real growth rings, with thin warm-gold #C0A35D contours on dark wood texture. At the center, four large stylized Latin letters "LYDT" arranged elegantly (L top-left, Y top-right, D bottom-left, T bottom-right) carved into the wood, gilded with muted gold. Outer ring decorated with subtle radial cuts and tiny firefly cyan glow #9CF0BD dots at four cardinal points.

Style: Refined Eastern xianxia mark, restrained, looks like a wax seal meets a tree cross-section. Not flashy, not game-style. High contrast. Symmetric. Crisp edges. No text outside the rings. No watermark. No Chinese characters in the logo itself. Single square composition, the emblem fills 85% of frame.

Color palette HEX: #0B211D, #24180F, #C0A35D, #9CF0BD, #E8E2CF.

Avoid: neon, purple, red, cartoonish, MMORPG game UI, oversaturated, modern minimalism, flat vector without depth.
